output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's the 60-Second Fix
output.meta_description: Frustrated because your landlord is withholding your security deposit? Learn your rights and send a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99.
content_outline: Is Your Landlord Breaking the Law? Know Your State Deadline
Illegal Deductions: What Landlords Can't Charge You For
The $19.99 Demand Letter That Gets Results (No Lawyer Needed)
Step-by-Step: How to Send Your Letter in 60 Seconds
key_points: Security deposit deadlines vary by state, but withholding beyond the legal limit opens landlords to statutory penalties.
Landlords cannot legally deduct for normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, or pre-existing damage.
Most tenants recover deposits simply by sending a professionally worded demand letter before going to court.
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific demand letters for $19.99 with no signup and no subscription.
output.cta: Don't let your landlord keep what's yours. Create your deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds—only $19.99, no signup required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated U.S. renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting security deposits
